segments.text: In you, Lord my God, I put my trust.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I trust in you; do not let me be put to shame, nor let my enemies triumph over me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: No one who hopes in you will ever be put to shame, but shame will come on those who are treacherous without cause.
Show me your ways, Lord, teach me your paths.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Guide me in your truth and teach me, for you are God my Savior, and my hope is in you all day long.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Remember, Lord, your great mercy and love, for they are from of old.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not remember the sins of my youth and my rebellious ways; according to your love remember me, for you, Lord, are good.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Good and upright is the Lord; therefore he instructs sinners in his ways.
He guides the humble in what is right and teaches them his way.
All the ways of the Lord are loving and faithful toward those who keep the demands of his covenant.
For the sake of your name, Lord, forgive my iniquity, though it is great.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Who, then, are those who fear the Lord? He will instruct them in the ways they should choose.
They will spend their days in prosperity, and their descendants will inherit the land.
The Lord confides in those who fear him; he makes his covenant known to them.
My eyes are ever on the Lord, for only he will release my feet from the snare.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Turn to me and be gracious to me, for I am lonely and afflicted.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Relieve the troubles of my heart and free me from my anguish.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Look on my affliction and my distress and take away all my sins.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: See how numerous are my enemies and how fiercely they hate me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Guard my life and rescue me; do not let me be put to shame, for I take refuge in you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May integrity and uprightness protect me, because my hope, Lord, is in you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Deliver Israel, O God, from all their troubles!
segments.speaker: David
